verdicts.note: Evidence confirms OAuth2 (3-legged flow) and personal access tokens (API key) used as Bearer tokens in Authorization header.
Evidence confirms paid-plan requirement: 'The Smartsheet API is restricted to users on Business and Enterprise plans' and no free tier includes API access.
Evidence shows API restricted to Business/Enterprise/Advanced Work Management plans, with self-serve token generation via Personal Settings once on a qualifying plan.
Evidence confirms REST API at base URL https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0/ with OpenAPI specification.
Evidence shows comprehensive coverage including sheets, rows, columns, cells, workspaces, users, alternate emails, etc. - justifies 'broad' classification.

The URL https://mcp.smartsheet.com returns an HTML page, not documentation of a dedicated MCP server. The evidence does not show this is an official Model Context Protocol server implementation. Cannot verify MCP server exists.
Correctly marked as 'buildable-with-caveats' since API access requires a paid Business/Enterprise/Advanced Work Management plan.
Accurately states that API access requires a paid plan with no free-tier credentials available.
While the URL exists, the evidence does not demonstrate this is a dedicated MCP server with documentation or usage instructions for Model Context Protocol integration.

revised.name: Smartsheet
revised.one_liner: Smartsheet offers a comprehensive REST API (OAuth2 or personal access tokens) for project management and collaboration, but API access requires a paid Business/Enterprise/Advanced Work Management plan.

auth_methods.notes: 3-legged OAuth 2.0 flow for third-party apps requiring user consent; Bearer token used in Authorization header.
Personal access token generated via Smartsheet UI (Personal Settings) for machine-to-machine integrations; used as Bearer token.

revised.self_serve_notes: No free tier for API access; requires Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plan. Once on a qualifying plan, developers can self-serve generate a personal access token via Personal Settings or implement OAuth2 without needing sales approval.

api_surface.notes: Full REST API (base https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0) with OpenAPI spec covering sheets, rows, columns, cells, workspaces, users, alternate emails, etc. Multiple regional endpoints (US/EU/AU). SDKs available in multiple languages (Java, C#, PHP, Go, Ruby, R, Python, Node.js/JS).

revised.main_blocker: API access is gated behind a paid Business/Enterprise/Advanced Work Management plan; no free-tier self-serve credentials.

evidence.supports: OAuth2 and API access token (Bearer) authentication methods
Personal access token generation and API restricted to Business/Enterprise plans
No free tier includes API access; requires paid plan
